name: Hammer of Virtue
detailed_description: Controller Recommended Full keyboard support but optimized for gamepad. About the Game A small group of terrorists called Scientific Freedom has set up force fields around the planet. 'The Unified Realm has assigned you to a hammer and the only indestructible armor in their possession to stop the threat. Use your combat skills to face various animals and robots controlled by evil scientists. Smash the environment with your hammer and hit the pieces against the foes, or use your attacking and blocking skills to fight them off. An action game with deliberate combat where you have to study the enemy's movements to win, or if that fails, just raise a building on top of them. The wicked scientists control numerous beasts and over 20 levels to stop us from finding out their evil plans. You, or the person who will wear the indestructible armor after you, is our only hope in this crazy adventure. Features Fully destructible environments. Split-Screen Co-Op and Deathmatch. Emergent gameplay with interactive environments. Deliberate combat. Read the enemy and act accordingly. Large Bestiary and over 20 levels. Skill based combat with no character progression and no loot.

name: VECTORLORD
detailed_description: Classic ‘90s aesthetics, inspired by Genesis and DOS Shareware games. Combine any two weapon power-ups into an even deadlier hybrid. Learn how to juggle your combo. Shoot, teleport, kick, and master a variety of powerful tide-turning consumable items. Replay earlier levels to gather resources, but beware - enemies grow stronger with time. VECTORLORD brings some modern twists to old-school difficulty. Players only have a limited number of lives to complete the game with (run out and it’s Game Over for that save file), and each successive life purchased costs more. Players have a safety net to fall back on, taking inspiration from modern classics like Dark Souls; players can restore lost lives by reclaiming them up from where they fell. As intense as that sounds, VECTORLORD offers multiple difficulty settings, plus options to tone down the neon glow for photosensitive players.

short_description: A retro-styled shooter that doesn't take itself too seriously. Warp between platforms and Dash through bullets. Beat up your enemies, or blast them away. Juggle your combo, and buy upgrades in the shop. Track down your corpse after you die.

name: Spy Alliance
detailed_description: 关于谍影成双 这是一款适合朋友/情侣体验的双人联机互动影游，双人单局游戏时长30-40分钟，希望为你们带来一段特别的双人独处时光。 写在前面 如果有一个游戏能让两个人共同经历、决定和创造一段惊险难忘的故事，会给真实世界中的两个人都带来触动吧，于是决定再难也先做一个「麻雀」项目出来看看。 第一次的尝试面临很多困难，资金有限、制作复杂、双人实时互动技术实现难等等，且全世界都找不到个同类，我们一直摸索，一直推翻重来，断断续续竟做了几年，终于将《谍影成双》带到大家面前。 这是一个紧凑的故事， 双人单次通关时长约30-40分钟，双人全内容体验时长约90分钟 ，男女主角有各自独立故事，也有共同配合的体验。 About the Game 关于谍影成双 这是一款主打朋友和情侣等社交体验的双人互动影游，旨在为你们营造一个轻松有趣的相处环境，故事情节相对不那么严肃。为了保证最佳互动体验，建议您和朋友、伴侣等熟悉、亲密或半亲密关系的伙伴联机体验。 购买建议 我们希望能为您的社交带来更多欢乐，所以更适合享受轻松氛围的玩家。如果您偏好重剧情和操作体验，我们建议您谨慎选择本作品，以保证获得符合预期的体验。 故事背景 你们，一个扮演秘密特工，一个扮演洪门打手。抗日阵营的分裂、至亲之人的遇难，让你们在同一任务中相遇。彼此互不知情的你们一开始互相提防，谨慎对抗，然而，危机不断来袭，你们不得不面对一个个抉择…… 在丰富的双人互动中，你们会体验合作的默契，在对抗中感受「尔虞我诈」，在「互撩」中品味不一样的「情感角力」。 两个人玩出独一无二的故事 两个人的选择，上百条分支走向，你们两个人玩出的就是最独特的故事。 玩法丰富多元，轻松上手，毫无压力 分支选择、QTE、合作解谜，没有谁比谁菜，就看默契怎么样了。 不止游戏，更是一个懂TA的机会 你不缺好玩的单机游戏，你不缺好玩的多人游戏，你缺的是两个人玩的游戏，和一个问出问题的时刻。 加入讨论 关注官方账号，和我们交流你的想法： 微信公众号：谍影成双官方 官方QQ群④：181318186 官方QQ群③：695843791 官方QQ群②：928014040 官方QQ群①：542963009 微信视频号：ALTLab工作室 B站官方号：谍影成双

name: Cacildes Adventure
detailed_description: ~ CACILDES ADVENTURE ~ 'A light-hearted soulslike about a kid and his journey to join the king's army.' ~ EXPANSION #2: Veilglade Peninsula 🍍🌴🌊 - Released ~ 'Travel to the Veilglades, a vibrant new region boasting a tropical island encircled by dazzling waves. But as night descends, an eerie threat looms over the isle. Plunge into an underwater, sunken college and unveil the dark secrets that haunt this forgotten place.' ~ EXPANSION #1: Sunkenland 🏰 - Released ~ 'Explore the Sunkenland, a new region packed with locations to discover, enemies to battle, and unique gear to acquire! Venture into the ancient dwarven keep concealed beneath the mountains and uncover the lost story of the Sundered people.' ~ THE STARTING POINT 🥚~ You are Cacildes*, a young boy eagerly awaiting a letter from the King, which will determine your future in the King’s Army. Meanwhile, your mother is worried: many chickens have gone missing. Driven by the threat of losing breakfast pancakes and other egg delicacies, you set out to find out what is going on. * Character customization (name, appearance and gender) is available since version 1.1 ~ BATTLE AWAITS⚔️ ~ Wield an arsenal of options to conquer your foes, from swords to shields, bows and magic; parry, counter-attack, attack from air and infuse your weapons with resins, throw bombs and lure enemies into ambushes - it's your choice! ~ A DYNAMIC WORLD 🏰 ~ Explore the many branching paths of the Slepbone region, a place on the brink of war between humans, orcs, and elves. Gather a party of companions or venture alone; discover secret bosses and carve out your reputation as a cruel or a noble knight of the king. ~ FEATURES ~ Combat heavily inspired by the soulslike genre , featuring dodges, parries, jump-attacks, guard-counters, posture-breaks, backstabs, one/two-handing weapons, bows, magic—you get the idea! + 30 weapons , ranging from ultra greatswords to daggers, bows, magic staves, double scythes, or a bleeding mace—there's enough arsenal for any situation! + 20 spells , from fireballs to raising skeletons from the dead, magic has you covered! Become stronger, and choose wisely from 5 stats: Vitality, Endurance, Strength, Dexterity, and Intelligence. Fight alone or alongside trusty companions, who'll tag along and make your journey easier. Appearances matter!, People will comment if you're naked, and you can use certain armors like the thief set to avoid fighting certain thieves. Day and night cycle, with different people and enemies appearing at different times of day. Your actions have impact, If you have lower reputation, people will lock their doors. Faith spells also scale with your reputation! Be who you want to be!, You can rename Cacildes, change his appearance, gender, and avatar portrait! Embark on New Game Plus , and bring your hard-earned weapons with you! Craft potions, with recipes and ingredients scattered around the world! Upgrade your weapons, by finding iron ores And more is coming! With new adventures on the horizon, you can count on frequent updates with bug fixes and additional content every so often!

name: PsychShift
detailed_description: Welcome to 'PsychShift' - A Mind-Altering FPS Adventure! Dive into the heart of the NeuroHive, a mysterious laboratory where reality twists, and your mind is your most potent weapon. 'PsychShift' is an FPS experience that combines innovative mechanics with a gripping narrative, challenging you to navigate through the labyrinthine corridors of the NeuroHive. Key Mechanics: 1. Mindswap: Master the art of Mindswap, a groundbreaking ability that allows you to switch places with enemies. Swap health, ammo, and location on the fly to outmaneuver your adversaries and conquer the challenges that lie ahead. 2. Parkour: Embrace the freedom of movement with dynamic Parkour elements. Wall run in a state of flow and stick to walls in a static state, allowing you to traverse the NeuroHive with unparalleled agility. Your acrobatic prowess becomes a vital asset in your quest for escape. 3. NeuroNetwork: Manipulate time with the NeuroNetwork, slowing it down to enhance your combat finesse. Execute lightning-fast Mindswaps and utilize the push-pull mechanic with precision, creating a symphony of destruction as you navigate the NeuroHive. 4. Push Pull Objects: Shape your environment with the unique Push-Pull mechanic. Pull ledges into existence or push objects to create cover, adding a strategic layer to the fast-paced FPS action. Adapt the NeuroHive to your advantage, turning the tables on your enemies. 5. Shooting: Engage in intense firefights with a diverse arsenal of weapons. Perfect your marksmanship skills as you face off against enemies in the ever-shifting NeuroHive. Combine your shooting abilities with the game's unique mechanics for a truly immersive FPS experience. Story: As a blank slate, you wake up in the NeuroHive, driven by an instinctual need to escape. A mysterious guiding voice urges you forward as you navigate through the labyrinth, encountering the Warden, a formidable guardian standing between you and freedom. Your journey is a relentless climb through the layers of the NeuroHive, with each level bringing new challenges and revelations. Prepare for a mind-bending FPS experience! 'PsychShift' will push your reflexes, strategic thinking, and parkour skills to the limit. Unravel the mysteries of the NeuroHive, and let the adrenaline-fueled action immerse you in a world where every shot counts. Your escape from the NeuroHive begins now!

short_description: PsychShift is a unique take on the fast and frenetic First-Person Shooter/Parkour formula. With one core mechanic at its center, the ability to instantaneously swap minds with nearly any enemy you choose. Taking on both their current position and also their characteristics.

name: Paper Protocol
detailed_description: Paper Protocol is a Tower Defense game where you and a squad of high tech turrets are tasked with defending the Paper Co. building from angry trees! Control and upgrade a versatile mech and a variety of turrets to defend from the trees. With so many possibilities of upgrades, there's a plethora of ways to defend! Each turret and yourself have the option of 3 main cores, Hellraiser, Saboteur, and Overdriver. Each are focused on a differing game plan. Hellraiser is all about dealing more damage and using brute force to destroy the trees. The Saboteur core slows, stuns and in other ways hinders the trees to give the turret battalion a better chance to take them out. Overdriver is geared towards helping your other turrets deal more damage and stay at the top of their game. The enemy trees aren't pushovers though! Each enemy has unique stats and some have abilities that can get out of hand if not handled correctly! Anywhere from more move speed, to an explosion on death that stuns all nearby turrets. Each enemy brings their own unique threat. Advance through the different difficulties, modifiers and maps to conquer the trees!

name: Ele-Mental
detailed_description: The one of a kind, fast paced, hardcore, arcade action, multiplayer, quick thinking, ele-ment absorbing, mental workout for everybody is back with a huge upgrade. Ele-Mental offers a fast paced exciting gameplay experience, perfect for local multiplayer or solo fun! Switch Ele-Ments at the press of a button, dodge opposing Ele-Ments while absorbing those that match. New Content Improved Graphics. Tighter Collisions. Rebalanced unlockable costs and earned Coins. Win medals for higher scores Complete missions fast for par. New Legend LeaderBoards Create and save all the custom levels you could ever want. Create custom 8 stage arcade machines with your levels. Create custom 10 stage survival decathlons with your levels. Mix 4 tunes by yourself now. Improved Audio. 2 Extra tunes. Resolution and anti-alias selection. Game Modes 100 Progressively challenging missions. 50 Survivals, from Casual to Ninja Pro. Doubled with Relentless mode. 10 Survival Decathlons. 10 Arcade Machines, each with 8 rounds. (Can you perfect them all) (I Can't) Creator Mode, create your own Missions and Survivals using all of the games mods and enemies. Little Ele-Venture, text based story adventure. Can you do the thing? (Normal and Hardcore) Free Party Mode - Unlocks all Missions, Survival, Arcade and Creator in Competitive play, allowing for an untested number of players in a tournament. Game Features 1-4 player co-op on everything above. Steam Leaderboards for Survival, Missions, Arcade and Story modes. Pure co-op, for 2 or 4 players you are restricted charging Ele-Ments so you must rely on your team mates. (Available on everything) Pure Competition, 6 games with mods for competitive play outside of Free Party. Dynamic Soundtrack evolves as you absorb. DJ Booth, 1-4 players each with a song from the game can remix all of the music. (This can get messy, Sync button recommended) 14 Skins, 11 to unlock as you earn XP during play. Ele-Medals. Like Achievements, but you get a little medal and some coins when you earn them. (Also Steam achievements) Stats. Ele-Ments absorbed, Enemy types absorbed, Games played, Mistakes made, coins earned, Fireworks purchased and More. Personal stats, Name your self, choose a skin, rack up XP and Absorbs and see how long you've been playing. 129 Things to unlock.

name: PumPum
detailed_description: PumPum is a casual game for adults with simple, relaxing gameplay, and features many sexy girls in different poses. Each girl shows off lovely graphics and animations! What you will find in the game: Beautiful animations of girls. Best animated wallpapers and avatars on Steam! Nintendo Switch™ version available! 4K resolution. Can be played with one hand! Awesome sound and visual effects. Gallery with hot pictures of girls. Lots of levels to play. Outstanding artwork, hot sexy girls, and easy to play! What else could you possibly need for a great gaming experience? If you love hot animated girls, then PumPum is meant for you! name: Florida Simulator 1986

name: How to Melt a Maiden's Heart
detailed_description: Fujibayashi Reo is your regular high school student. He would prefer to sleep in than go to class, and he cares more about football than he does about studying for his exams. He’s not the best student, and he’s always getting into arguments with the stern student council president, Sugawara Yuuma. Reo can’t stand Yuuma, and the feeling is mutual. Both boys hate one another — but when Reo discovers that Yuuma has been crossdressing and working at a maid café in secret, Reo gets an idea. Reo decides to blackmail the upstanding student council president into aiding him with the seduction of his childhood friend, Chinami. With Yuuma’s help, Reo’s sure that he’ll be able to confess his feelings to Chinami and melt her heart… So why has Reo started to feel so shy and self-conscious when he’s with Yuuma? What in the world is going on?! 90,000 words of text (approx 4-8 hours of reading) A linear story with no choices/branches Gorgeous character artwork An original soundtrack A wholesome love story One cute crossdressing boy!

name: Forest of Tails: Arena
detailed_description: Forest of Tails: Arena puts you in the role of a mouse fighting in the Fieval arena for eternal mouse glory. Use stick, axe, and acorn to defeat wave after wave of angry enemies. Forest of Tails: Arena is a real-time action arena game that pits you against bugs, animals, and even other mice. Fight your way through waves, gain new skills, and loot powerful equipment to fight your way through progressively more difficult levels. Death doesn't mean the end for you; pick yourself back up and continue from your last checkpoint with all your skills and equipped gear in tact. Play Your Way After creating and customizing your mouse, you'll be thrust into the pits. Do you want to bludgeon ants using a rock warhammer? Maybe you'd rather poison lizards using your bow fashioned from plant roots. You'll be given lots of options on how to take down the unique enemies you'll find in the game. Level up and Grow Earn and select perks every time you level up. As you grow and improve your character, better and more unique randomized loot will drop for you. Combine weapon and character talents to create a force to be reckoned with. Fight, Die and Fight Again Death is only the beginning. Every time you die, you can take your equipped gear and stats back into the fight at your last checkpoint. Grind your way to the top and fight the biggest, baddest enemies that the arena can throw at you.

name: The King's Dilemma: Chronicles
detailed_description: Welcome to the Kingdom of Ankist: a place of daring expeditions, gruesome battles, and arcane mysteries. You play as the Head of the Council, the leader of the King’s inner circle. Listen to the advice of your Council of Houses, or overrule their decisions. Face hundreds of dilemmas where every choice you make may affect your relationship with the other Houses, influence the well-being and resources of the kingdom, and change the course of history itself. Discover the lands of Ankist over a story spanning across tens of generations. Form alliances, survive betrayals, and prepare for the final uprising foretold by an ancient prophecy. Will you act for the greater good, or will you think only of yourself? Explore the map of Ankist and see the Kindom’s problems currently at hand. Choose one, and the Council will be summoned to make a decision: do we send help to people hit by famine? Should we wage war against that northern tribe raiding the villages across our border? The Houses will cast their vote: “Aye” or “Nay” based on their personal interest and political stance. At that point, you might decide to influence the vote, spending your House’s finances to corrupt members of the council, or consuming some fo the limited “power” points you are given for the rule of each King. Each decision you make has consequences both on your relations with the other Houses and on the Kingdom’s resources, which in turn might result in the King abdicating or being overthrown. But they will also make more dilemmas become available on the map. Based on the resources standing at the end of the current King’s rule and your moral alignment, you will be awarded “greed” and “influence” points, which you’ll be able to spend to research technology, start expeditions, or build structures. Which of these will become available depends on the choices you made. Each of the above will award you money and resources during the rule of each King, in addition to changing the events of the final uprising you will be preparing for. Play as one of twelve different houses, each with their own narrative goal Discover 300+ story-driven dilemmas through Ankist and its neighboring kingdoms Choose branching narrative paths across six intertwined storylines Explore multiple endings, with each playthrough lasting 3 to 4 hours Use influence or corruption to control the Council Invest in research, technology and buildings Play across generations, choose your heir as well as their personality and goals Always be preparing for the final battle The King’s Dilemma: Chronicles tells the story of Ankist, a fictional medieval kingdom in the continent of Lywik. The structure of the kingdom is feudal: the Duchies and the Marks are managed by their ruling Houses, many of which also have their representatives sitting at the Council, a governing body ruling in the name of the King located in Lybra, the capital city of the Kingdom. As the leader of the Council, all social classes will come asking for your help: Merchants, Scholars, the Army, the Cult of the Mother, and of course, the People. It will be your task to drive the choices of the Council and satisfy their requests… but you’ll also have to manage the resources of the Kingdom, and keeping everyone happy won’t be easy. Your main interest is obviously to make Ankist prosper; however, you are also trying to increase the power and the prestige of your own family over the others. The campaign spans decades and generations, and you will assume the role of different representatives of your House over the course of the game.

Get to know the whole universe of Avaronia and its unique nations ranging from Humans, Orcs, Elves and more!
short_description: Lands of Avaronia is an oldschool fantasy RPG in which you take a role as one of the Mercenaries. Help the Kingdom to push back the Orcish Invasion which is threatening to the Human nation. Discover the mysteries of Avaronia, a classic fantasy adventure awaits you.

name: Drakkhen
detailed_description: The prophecy has been fulfilled. The world shall be ruled by the dragons. On an island far away, their lords prepare for the conquest of the lands. There is only one hope for mankind. The emperor sends out four heroes -- warriors and magicians -- to solve the puzzle of tears and prevent the invasion of the Drakkhen. Drakkhen is a role-playing game with a visual presentation that combines 3D landscapes and 2D interiors. The player will encounter monsters and fight them in real-time combat, and discover the palaces of the dragon lords. Indoors, the player has to find a way through the maze of chambers, solving puzzles and defeating the minions of the Drakkhen.

name: Raining Blobs
detailed_description: Raining Blobs is a fast-paced arcade puzzle game based around matching falling blocks. Matching blocks of the same color will link them together while matching blocks with stars in them will destroy the linked blocks. This game will put both your fingers and mind to a test of raw skill. Prove that you have what it takes to survive the endless blob rain! Key Features: Adore the cast of cute female protagonists inspired by anime style art. Crush your competition with up to 8 player local coop or vs mode! Show your friends just how good you are! Up to 16 with CPUs! Secure your position as the undisputed Raining Blobs master by rising to the top of the leaderboards in Arcade, Endless Battle, Tournament and Puzzle modes. Advance your way through a selection of fierce battles in Tournament mode and unravel the story. Solve all mind-bending puzzles in Puzzle mode. Collect a wide selection of challenging and rewarding achievements. A lot of useful stats.

name: What's On The Menu?
detailed_description: Do you have what it takes to manage the perfect restaurant? In What's on the Menu? , you’ll take on the role of a restaurant manager, where every choice you make shapes your success. From purchasing equipment and hiring staff to crafting unique menus and handling unexpected events, the road to becoming the ultimate restaurateur is full of challenges and rewards! Build and Customize Your Dream Restaurant Start by designing your restaurant from the ground up. Choose your furniture, appliances, and decor to create a unique atmosphere that will attract customers. Will your restaurant be a cozy French bistro or a trendy New York café? The choice is yours! Create Mouthwatering Menus Your restaurant’s menu is the heart of your business. Handpick ingredients, experiment with recipes, and serve dishes that will keep your customers coming back for more. Will you focus on classic comfort foods or adventurous haute cuisine? Balance quality and cost to ensure your restaurant stays profitable while keeping diners satisfied. Manage Your Team and Operations Behind every successful restaurant is a well-managed team. Hire the right staff, assign them to key tasks, and keep them motivated as the kitchen heats up. Efficient management is key to serving customers quickly and keeping the business running smoothly. Tackle Random Events and Challenges Expect the unexpected! From sudden rushes of customers to surprise health inspections, random events will keep you on your toes. Can you adapt quickly and make the right decisions under pressure? Progress and Unlock New Recipes As you grow your restaurant empire, earn research points to unlock new recipes and improve your kitchen. Each new dish brings new challenges, but also new opportunities to impress your guests and increase your restaurant’s reputation. Key Features Design and customize your restaurant with furniture, decor, and kitchen equipment. Create unique menus by selecting ingredients and crafting dishes that match your restaurant’s style. Hire and manage staff to ensure smooth operations and efficient service. Handle random events like customer rushes, inspections, and more to keep things exciting. Progress through levels , unlocking new restaurants, recipes, and challenges as you advance. Are you ready to find out What's on the Menu?

name: DEFECTIVE
detailed_description: You must save the world, whatever the cost... DEFECTIVE - This is a First Person Shooter (FPS) with action elements throughout.. The Story Defective takes place in the year 2068 when the world has beencaptured and controlled by a race of alien robotic creatures. All known life on Earth has been burned and destroyed and theworld has been changed radically, this has forced the remaining people to live hidden underground. The richest of those remainingnow live inside space stations, and not all have surrendered to the robotic threat, some continue to ﬁght for what they believe in.This has included an attempt by a detachment of peacekeepers to blow up an interplanetary planet, although this opportunity failedit was not completely pointless as a single defective robot was collected which could later be reprogrammed. This is where your story begins, after several years to reprogram this robot so begins the liberation of the Earth from the hands of the alien invaders... Use: Deceleration of time Inventory Jet Jumping And finally understand why this all happened!

name: Cop Academy
detailed_description: In Cop Academy, 4 to 8 players take on different challenges to earn points for their team, and pass the academy's final exam. Only one team will get to join the ranks of the prestigious Otterwa Police Department. And eat lots of donuts in the process. Each team takes turns in sending one of its champions to take on crazy fun challenges in VR. 5 quick trials of 20 seconds each will test your speed and dexterity. However, an officier never works alone. You will need the help of your teammates who have access to critical information on their PC display or TV. Cooperation is the key , so stay focused and communicate as much as you can. What do you do then?...when the opposing team is playing, and you have nothing to do on your couch/sofa/anything you are sitting on? How about trying to interfere with their communication? After all, real officers will face opponents who don't play nice, so why would you? You can also prepare your strategy for the next champion on your team to come well equipped. After all, good communication requires planning. Whatever your style of play, challenges will require you to find your inner action hero : eat flying donuts, release chocolate bars stuck in the vending machine and survive a riot (and more!), to prove what a fearless officer you can be. Do you think you have what it takes to be one of the best? Achievements await the bravest of officers, and medals reward you for reaching perfect success in a challenge. An actual medal. With a golden 'ok hand' emoji on it. If that doesn't tell you how impressed your supervisors are, we don't know what will. Cop Academy is perfect for hanging out with your friends for a great night (and is even better if you have some snacks to share). It has also proven to be a really good replacement for Rock-Paper-Scissors, for all you intense people out there.

name: Deck of Life: No Turns, Individual Card Permadeath
detailed_description: Unblocked Enemy Attacks Permanently Remove Cards From Your Deck Enemy attacks destroy cards from your deck and they are not available in the next encounter. Protect your Cards while Destroying your Opponent's Hand Play cards on your side of the field to launch projectiles or construct defenses. Draw new cards from your deck automatically at an upgradable rate. Survive Each Run The cards in your hand are always physically on the field and can be attacked at any time with projectiles. You defeat the enemy if you destroy all the enemy's cards on the field. Your run ends if all your cards on the field are destroyed. Choose Cards to Reinforce your Deck's Strategy As you clear enemies and events your deck gains cards unique to the floor. Each floor has a unique pool of cards that work well together. Choose a Path to Control your Deck's Evolution Each level you have a choice of 2 floors with a unique card pool. You always have the option to continue acquiring cards of the same type or to branch off into a different random card type. As you clear levels the random floors increase in difficulty. Unlock New Starting Decks Every floor you defeat you gain a new deck that you can start a run with. This new deck has cards specific to the floor's unique cards.
